name: react-core
title: moduix React core
description: React-specific icons and shared foundation dependencies for moduix React registry components.

files.content:
export {
  CalendarIcon,
  CheckIcon,
  CloseIcon,
  CopyIcon,
  ChevronDownIcon,
  ChevronLeftIcon,
  ChevronRightIcon,
  ChevronUpIcon,
  ChevronUpDownIcon,
  EyeClosedIcon,
  EyeIcon,
  IndeterminateIcon,
  MinusIcon,
  PencilIcon,
  PipetteIcon,
  PlusIcon,
  PopupArrowIcon,
  RatingStarIcon,
  ScrubCursorIcon,
  SeparatorMarkIcon,
  TrashIcon,
  UploadIcon,
} from './Icons';
